pattern_alerts.description: Where is decision-making authority moving? Which institutions gained or lost autonomy, oversight, or independence? Fully direction-agnostic: flags authority shifts whether from the executive, legislative, judicial branch, or any other actor.
pattern_alerts.market_implication: Institutional instability — increased volatility, defense sector sensitivity

pattern_alerts.description: Is a narrative being artificially amplified? Looks for coordinated timing, identical framing across unrelated outlets, suspiciously synchronized messaging, or fingerprints of inauthentic promotion — from any direction.
pattern_alerts.market_implication: Coordinated narrative push — watch for pump-and-dump dynamics in affected sectors

pattern_alerts.description: What has this person or institution said in the past vs. what they're saying now? Flags reversals of position, inconsistent claims, or statements that contradict the public record — applied equally to all parties regardless of political direction.
pattern_alerts.market_implication: Official contradictions — credibility risk, sector uncertainty

market_signals.contract: Will Trump fire Jerome Powell in 2026?
Will Brent crude exceed $90/bbl by June 2026?
Will U.S. GDP growth exceed 2% in Q2 2026?
Will Fed cut rates before July 2026?
Will U.S. inflation (CPI) remain above 3% through Q3 2026?
Will China impose counter-tariffs on U.S. goods by May 2026?
Will EU implement counter-tariffs on U.S. goods before July 2026?
Will NATO send troops to Ukraine in 2026?
Will Ukraine-Russia ceasefire be signed before end of 2026?
Will Taiwan Strait military incident occur in 2026?

trajectory.update: Trajectory: Multi-front pressure campaign in week one of April. Trade war escalation is primary market mover — Kalshi recession odds jumped 13 points in 48 hours. Simultaneously: Fed independence stress test underway (Powell threat), EU-U.S. relationship deteriorating, China using Taiwan exercises as leverage signal. Pattern alert: authority_shift and amplification_pattern co-occurring across trade, monetary, and defense domains simultaneously — historically associated with volatility clustering. Watch: Will EU member states approve counter-tariffs? Will China retaliate before April 5 implementation date?
key_events: Trump Liberation Day tariffs signed — 54% on China, 20% EU, effective April 5
China counter-tariff threat escalates — MFA statement signals broad retaliation
Fed officials hold line on rates despite Trump pressure — Powell removal risk elevated
NATO fractures on Ukraine ceasefire terms — Baltic vs France/Germany divide
DOGE savings audit shows $2.7T claim inflated by ~18x per CBO

pending_approvals.thesis_summary: Agricultural ETF DBA will surge 8-12% as markets wake up to locked-in food inflation from current diesel/fertilizer costs [ANALYSIS]. Spring planting decisions over next 6 weeks are irreversible, guaranteeing higher food prices regardless of Iran resolution [ANALYSIS].
